creator: christophe.maury@protonmail.com
text:
Created attachment 229495
Select 2 files (bottom) to move (midle) to destination (top) and nothing happens.

Problem with rox-filer Package in Architecture   : FreeBSD:13:amd64

Randomly rox generate a bad file descriptor

** (ROX-Filer:29427): ERROR **: 20:59:30.331: select() failed: Bad file descriptor

When you select several files to move, them nothing happens.
See Attached files...

I tested with the same rox version of the binary package of the 12:AMD architecture it works perfectly.

Name           : rox-filer
Version        : 2.11_9
Installed on   : Sun Nov 14 21:04:47 2021 CET
Origin         : x11-fm/rox-filer
Architecture   : FreeBSD:12:amd64
